channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tensions rise between Trump and Meloni over Italy's stance on Iran and Israel
item.description: US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, accusing her of lacking courage after Italy chose not to support American strikes on Iran. In an interview with...

item.title: Top Headlines From Nigeria Today, Wednesday, 15th April, 2026
item.description: Good morning Naija! Today we dey look top stories wey dey ginger news for Nigeria. President Bola Tinubu don yan say the new tax laws wey him government don introduce go help correct the wahala wey co...

item.title: Malema prepares legal strategy to appeal potential prison sentence
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema has outlined a detailed legal plan to immediately appeal if he is sentenced to prison during his upcoming court proceedings in the Eastern Cape. Malema, convicted in October o...

item.title: York Police Charge 15 Individuals Over Alleged Fraud in Homelessness Prevention Program
item.description: York Regional Police have charged 15 individuals in connection with alleged fraudulent claims made to a homelessness prevention program in Vaughan, Ontario. The central figure is Isaac Oppong, a forme...

item.title: Amit Shah Promises Constitutional Resolution for Gorkha Issue Without Dividing Bengal
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, during his rally in Gangarampur, South Dinajpur, clarified that if BJP comes to power, the Gorkha issue will be addressed in a constitutional manner without splitting Be...

item.title: CAG recommends governance and financial management reforms to improve accountability
item.description: In Dodoma, the Controller and Auditor General (CAG) of Tanzania has released a set of far-reaching recommendations following the 2024/25 audit findings. The report, presented to Parliament and made pu...

item.title: Prince Harry discusses fatherhood challenges and mental health during visit to Australia
item.description: During the second day of the Duke and Duchess of Sussex’s Australian visit, Prince Harry spoke openly about the emotional challenges of becoming a father and the importance of mental wellbeing. At an ...

item.title: Hawthorn Showing Strong Premiership Potential with Solid Midfield and Balanced Team Performance
item.description: After a shaky start to the 2026 AFL season, Hawthorn has emerged as a serious premiership contender. Despite losing key midfield players such as James Worpel and Will Day, the Hawks have seen outstand...

item.title: Key African Political, Social, and Humanitarian Updates for April 15, 2026
item.description: This news report covers major events across Africa as of April 15, 2026. In South Africa, President Cyril Ramaphosa has appointed Roelf Meyer as the new ambassador to the United States, filling a post...

item.title: Financial Challenges Faced by Made In Chelsea Cast Members Despite On-Screen Glamour
item.description: Despite the luxurious lifestyles portrayed on the reality series Made In Chelsea, several cast members have faced serious financial difficulties. Ashley James admitted to being 'the poorest she had ev...

item.title: Rice price drop forces Nigerian farmers to reduce cultivation
item.description: Rice farmers for Nigeria dey reduce how dem dey plant rice for 2026 because paddy rice price don fall sharply, production costs dey high, and plenty rice mills dey struggle. The price of one ton of pa...

item.title: Essy Wa Willy Demands Payment Following State House Invitation by Karang’u Muraya
item.description: Kenyan musician and influencer Essy Wa Willy has publicly spoken out about her recent visit to State House Nairobi. She was part of a group of Akorino musicians and elders who attended a service at St...

item.title: U.S. Enforces Full Naval Blockade on Iran Amid West Asia Tensions; Israel-Lebanon Agree to Negotiations
item.description: On April 15, 2026, the United States confirmed that it has fully implemented a maritime blockade of Iranian ports, halting all economic trade to and from Iran. This action comes amid ongoing tensions ...

item.title: Corruption in Kenya’s justice system leaving defilement survivors without recourse
item.description: In Kenya, corruption within the police and judicial system is systematically undermining justice for survivors of sexual violence, leaving them intimidated, silenced, and without recourse. Cases of de...

item.title: Western Cape police colonel detained by IPID over alleged sexual assault of subordinate
item.description: The Independent Police Investigative Directorate (IPID) has arrested a Western Cape police colonel in connection with allegations of sexual assault and rape. The incident allegedly involved a female s...

item.title: PUV Drivers and Operators Launch Three-Day Nationwide Strike over Fuel Costs and Government Aid
item.description: Members of the transport group MANIBELA, joined by other driver organizations, began a three-day nationwide strike on Wednesday, April 15, 2026, to call attention to the rising fuel prices and the per...

item.title: Fuel shortage and hoarding drive petrol prices up in Kajiado
item.description: Residents of Ilbisil and Maili Tisa towns in Kajiado County are facing a major fuel shortage, with petrol prices soaring to as high as Sh450 per litre—well above the official price set by the Energy a...

item.title: Over 250 Rohingya and Bangladeshi migrants feared missing after trawler capsizes in Andaman Sea
item.description: Around 250 people, including many children, are feared missing after a trawler carrying Rohingya refugees and Bangladeshi nationals capsized in the Andaman Sea, according to a joint statement by the U...

item.title: Theft and Vandalism of Telecom Infrastructure Disrupts Network Services in Nigeria
item.description: For Nigeria, the wahala wey dey for mobile network no be just ordinary technical problem. E plenty dey because thieves dey chop important power equipment like generators and batteries wey base station...

item.title: Nigerian Opposition Parties Face Leadership and Strategy Challenges
item.description: A recent commentary analyzes the struggles of Nigeria's opposition parties, highlighting issues of leadership, strategy, and a lack of unified direction. The piece criticizes the frequent shifts in pa...
